text:
Once upon a time, in a quiet town called Whiskerville, there lay a cottage hidden by an old oak tree. Inside this cottage lived a simple lady named Millie, who had quite an extraordinary pet. Millie kept a golden retriever puppy named Rufus. Rufus wasn't just any ordinary pup; he could talk. Whenever Millie fed him, Rufus would say, "Good morning, sweet dreams!"

One serene autumn day, Rufus woke up with a start. His ears perked up and he looked around the cozy little cottage. "Good morning!" he barked happily, wagging his tail.

Millie smiled fondly. "Good morning, Rufus. Isn't it beautiful outside?"

Rufus sat by the window, paw tracing patterns on the windowpane. "The leaves?" he ventured.

"Yes," Millie began. "They're turning orange and gold."

"Orange?" Rufus looked disappointed.
